    forumDatabase - Static variable in class applicationMain.FoundationsMain
    The forum database instance used for storing posts and replies.
    ForumDatabase - Class in database
    Manages the database operations for the forum.
    ForumDatabase() - Constructor for class database.ForumDatabase
    Default constructor for ForumDatabase.
    FoundationsF25 - module FoundationsF25
    Main module for the FoundationsF25 application.
    FoundationsMain - Class in applicationMain
    Main application class for the Foundations application.

    foundLongEnough - Static variable in class passwordPopUpWindow.Model
    Indicates if the password is long enough.
    foundLowerCase - Static variable in class passwordPopUpWindow.Model
    Indicates if a lowercase letter was found.
    foundNumericDigit - Static variable in class passwordPopUpWindow.Model
    Indicates if a numeric digit was found.
    foundShortEnough - Static variable in class passwordPopUpWindow.Model
    Indicates if the password is short enough.
    foundSpecialChar - Static variable in class passwordPopUpWindow.Model
    Indicates if a special character was found.
    foundUpperCase - Static variable in class passwordPopUpWindow.Model
    Indicates if an uppercase letter was found.
